# FFERR_HASEFFECTS | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_HASEFFECTS ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_haseffects)

-  FFERR_HASEFFECTS 

Global Variable# FFERR_HASEFFECTS

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_HASEFFECTS: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_haseffects#Discussion)

The device cannot be reinitialized because there are still effects attached to it.
